race.comment: ODESSA (4) was a sharp improver second up when beaten a head on the Parks surface and has enough dash to offset the sticky draw. Hitting her straps now. BEYOND MYSTI (8) only warmed late second up when thrown into the deep end in the LR Redelva Stakes but this is much easier and she draws to take closer order, with Toeroek back aboard another strong push. OMAHA DAWN (2) was a good winner fresh and then charged late here last time to grab a minor placing. Clearly in form and with more to offer. SKADOOSH (5) will be hoping they roll along early so she can launch off the back of them. Gets in light with the 3kg claimer sticking and can burst through late. IN LOVE (1) looks the main pace influence and will give them something to catch.
